svg.text: In-Memory Metrics Appliance — a visual overview
Shuffle · event-time bucketing · load balancing across cores. Thread-per-core, no durable storage: the large-scale aggregating telemetry-SDK profile.
Branch jmacd/planning · stages: receiver → partition (split-by-key) → partition-dispatch topic (placement + load_feedback) → metrics_admission + event_time_window (windowing) per core.
EWT · many per host · small metric events
Engine runs a strict thread-per-core model
tags Context::partition (rides to the dispatch hop)
SubscriptionMode::PartitionDispatch · exclusive partition → owner · keys fixed to buckets

Lease + generation fencing arrive with durability.

so the handoff carries no live per-series state.

stateful aggregation balances only via placement.
